description_long: This is a modern, hard-shell rolling briefcase with a predominantly black exterior and silver-gray accents. It features a telescopic handle made of metal with a plastic grip, extending from one end for easy pulling. The briefcase is equipped with four multidirectional wheels, each mounted at the corners for smooth maneuverability. The body appears to be constructed from a durable plastic or polycarbonate material, with a zipper running along the edge for secure closure. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for urban professionals or travelers. No external pockets, brand logos, or visible corner reinforcements are present.
description: A sleek, hard-shell rolling briefcase with a telescopic handle and four corner wheels, finished in black and silver-gray.
description_view_0: Front view shows the telescopic handle extended and the main zipper seam along the edge.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the length of the handle, the zipper, and two of the four wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the four wheels and the back panel, with the handle retracted into the case.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the handle stowed, zipper seam, and the other two wheels.
attribute_handle_type: One telescopic, retractable handle made of metal with a plastic grip, attached to the top end of the briefcase; handle is rigid and designed for pulling.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Zipper closure running along the edge; no visible combination or key lock.
